zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr於1470年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧頓時，他的父親George Campbell22歲，母親Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery5歲。他和Isobel Wallace of Craigie至少有1個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1508年8月4日在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度享年38歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr于1470年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾盧頓时，他的父亲George Campbell22岁，母亲Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery5岁。他和Isobel Wallace of Craigie至少有1个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1508年8月4日在英国苏格兰艾斯爾盧度享年38岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰艾斯爾盧度。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr was born in 1470, in Loudon, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, George Campbell, was 22 and his mother, Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery, was 5. He had at least 1 son and 6 daughters with Isobel Wallace of Craigie. He died on 4 August 1508, in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr est né en 1470, à Loudon, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, George Campbell, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery, avait 5 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles avec Isobel Wallace of Craigie. Il est décédé le 4 août 1508, à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr 1470 in Loudon, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Campbell 22 und seine Mutter Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery 5. Er hatte mit Isobel Wallace of Craigie mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 4. August 1508 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr è nato il nel 1470 nel Loudon, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, George Campbell, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery, aveva 5 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie con Isobel Wallace of Craigie. Morì il 4 agosto 1508, nel Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayrが1470年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドンで生まれた時，父George Campbellは22歳，母Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomeryは5歳であった。彼はIsobel Wallace of Craigieとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1508年8月4日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンで38歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr(이)가 1470년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Campbell(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery(은)는 5세였다. 그는 Isobel Wallace of Craigie(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1508년 8월 4일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 루다운에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 루다운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr nasceu em 1470, em Loudon, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, George Campbell, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery, tinha 5 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas com Isobel Wallace of Craigie. Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1508, em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr родился в 1470 г. в местности лоудон, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени George Campbell было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery, 5. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей от Isobel Wallace of Craigie. Он умер 4 августа 1508 г. в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr nació en 1470, en Loudon, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, George Campbell, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery, tenía 5 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas con Isobel Wallace of Craigie. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1508, en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
